items.text: With Chisa's treatment over, you once again return to the Black Shores...

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: Ah, {PlayerName}. Perfect timing. There's something you need to know.

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: Since we took charge of the Honami Sonoro Sphere, we've been noticing some changes on the inside—

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: The link between Honami and the real world is stabilizing, and the city's time flow is almost in sync.

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: But scans from Tethys indicate that much of the recent frequency exchanges weren't passing through this rift.

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: Meaning it could either just be a misreading due to overlapping data, or... there's another access point to the Honami Sonoro Sphere.

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: On top of that, the city's buzzing with unidentified phenomena and unconfirmed hazard zones. We'll continue to monitor them closely and run further analysis.

options.text: By the way, how's Chisa doing?

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: She's just completed her treatment. Everything seems to be all right. Her Rabelle's Curve is within normal parameters, and there are no significant lingering Overclocking symptoms.

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: That said, I don't recommend repeating what happened in Honami. That level of Resonance strain is unsustainable.

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: Ah, excuse me.

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: ...Yes. Mm-hmm. Got it. {Male=He;Female=She}'s with me right now.

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: I just got a call that Chisa submitted an itinerary not long ago and left for Honami alone.

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: She didn't specify. All she wrote was "I want to go back."

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: You can find her guide KU-Roro in the Haven of Sprouts. It may know something.

items.speaker: {PlayerName}
items.text: I'll go check it out. Knowing Chisa, she usually doesn't act without purpose.

dialog.stepLabel: Chisa: "Is something wrong, {PlayerName}? Why did you turn back?..."

items.speaker: Chisa
items.text: Is something wrong, {PlayerName}? Why did you turn back?

options.text: I heard a voice on the radio just now.
I heard someone calling my name.

items.speaker: Chisa
items.text: A voice from the radio? But isn't it broken?

items.speaker: Chisa
items.text: You did? I'm right next to you, but... I don't think I heard anything.

items.speaker: Chisa
items.text: Yes. You must be exhausted. Should we go back to the cafe?

options.text: I guess I could use some rest.

items.speaker: {PlayerName}
items.text: (I don't think I was imagining it... that voice.)

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: Anything else you'd like to know? As long as it's within my authority, I can answer.

options.text: About Chisa's stay at the Black Shores...

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: After Honami was devastated, energy from the Lament sealed the entire city into a unique Sonoro Sphere like congealed amber. Its time flow was slowed down compared to the rest of the world.

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: A similar case would be Mt. Firmament. Being on the inside for a day means up to a hundred days might have passed on the outside.

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: But it's not permanent. As Honami's connection to reality grows stronger, the flow of time begins to restore itself.

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: You getting sucked into Honami through that rift has got Shorekeeper worried sick, and she's been closely monitoring everything that's going on over there since.

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: Good thing is, at that point, Honami's time flow was no longer that different from the real world. So to us, you were only gone for just a bit.

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: While she was recovering, Chisa applied for partial access to the Black Shores database, mainly to learn general knowledge and modern trends.

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: We also saw her strolling around the living area and taking a look at the facilities occasionally, just like a lot of the New Branches when they first get here.

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: The KU-Roro responsible for taking care of her can fill you in if you want to know more.

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: Sumika is a member of the Black Shores who went M.I.A. many years ago. We dispatched a team on a search and rescue, but nothing solid came of it.

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: The report Chisa submitted to us has detailed Sumika's operations and engagements in Honami.

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: She was one of the most outstanding researchers of the Error Cell, and an elite Bloom Bearer who made the Black Shores proud.

items.speaker: Valentina
items.text: The Stellar Matrix will forever remember her noble pursuit of truth.
